notes: This plan describes read-only source files that are copied into benchmark/samples for local benchmark population.
The original DCIM tree must remain untouched.
Curated sample media stays local under benchmark/samples and is intentionally ignored from git.

single_raw.label: Walkway blossoms daylight baseline
single_raw.selection_reason: Daylight baseline sample for general detail, color, and timing checks.

single_raw.label: Midtone blossom branch closeup
single_raw.selection_reason: Branch detail sample for midtone texture and edge retention.

single_raw.label: Shaded blossom closeup
single_raw.selection_reason: Lower-light closeup sample for denoise and detail preservation checks.

single_raw.label: Street candid backlight RW2
single_raw.selection_reason: RW2 daylight sample with harder tonal contrast.

single_raw.label: Macro blossom RW2
single_raw.selection_reason: RW2 close-focus sample for optical correction and fine detail checks.

single_raw.label: Night portrait with blossoms
single_raw.selection_reason: Night portrait sample for low-light recovery and color stability.

single_raw.label: Day portrait with blossoms
single_raw.selection_reason: Balanced daylight portrait sample for skin-tone and highlight checks.

single_raw.label: Campus walk detail sample
single_raw.selection_reason: Additional daylight detail sample to broaden the local gold set.

tri_raw.label: Apartment window blossom HDR
tri_raw.selection_reason: Static scene with a wide exposure spread for highlight and shadow recovery.

tri_raw.label: Night walkway HDR
tri_raw.selection_reason: Night scene under strong lamps for low-light HDR and noise pressure.

tri_raw.label: Night selfie motion bracket
tri_raw.selection_reason: Handheld selfie sequence with clear subject movement for deghost and fallback checks.

tri_raw.label: Night path narrow bracket
tri_raw.selection_reason: Night scene with a narrow EV span for limited HDR-gain and fallback pressure.
